rationale.R1.5: The revised draft presents a coherent and well-structured plan for the end-to-end section, with clear per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent has explicitly disclosed uncertainty in the trimming bounds (0.05/0.95) and retained fraction (91%), providing transparency on potential limitations.
rationale.RX.3: The revised draft accurately reflects the scope of the study, covering exactly the agreed J*(d), with no substantial drifts or omissions.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, with no regressions or fabrications introduced; instead, it identifies and addresses potential issues in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance and traceability throughout the revised draft.
